mapper.sql: ID AS id, ORDER_ID AS orderId, ORDER_NO AS orderNo, PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, CURRENCY AS currency, PAID_TM AS paidTm, CANCELLED_TM AS cancelledTm, CANCEL_AMOUNT AS cancelAmount, FAIL_REASON AS failReason, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm

ID AS id, PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, PAYMENT_NO AS paymentNo, ORDER_ID AS orderId, ORDER_NO AS orderNo, PAY_TYPE AS payType, PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, AMOUNT AS amount, PG_PROVIDER AS pgProvider, PG_TID AS pgTid, PORTONE_PAYMENT_ID AS portonePaymentId, APPROVED_TM AS approvedTm, CANCELLED_TM AS cancelledTm, CANCEL_AMOUNT AS cancelAmount, FAIL_REASON AS failReason, RAW_RESPONSE AS rawResponse, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm
mapper.insert: /* Payment.insertPayment */ INSERT INTO TB_PAYMENT ( ORDER_ID, ORDER_NO, PAYMENT_ID, PAYMENT_STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, CURRENCY, CANCEL_AMOUNT, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{paymentId}, COALESCE(#{paymentStatus}, 'R'), COALESCE(#{totalAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{currency}, 'KRW'), COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )

/* Payment.insertPaymentDet */ INSERT INTO TB_PAYMENT_DET ( PAYMENT_ID, PAYMENT_NO, ORDER_ID, ORDER_NO, PAY_TYPE, PAY_METHOD, PAYMENT_STATUS, AMOUNT, PG_PROVIDER, PG_TID, PORTONE_PAYMENT_ID, RAW_RESPONSE, CANCEL_AMOUNT, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{paymentId}, #{paymentNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{payType}, #{payMethod}, COALESCE(#{paymentStatus}, 'R'), COALESCE(#{amount}, 0), #{pgProvider}, #{pgTid}, #{portonePaymentId}, #{rawResponse}::jsonb, COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: /* Payment.updatePaymentStatus */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT SET PAYMENT_STATUS = #{paymentStatus}, FAIL_REASON = #{failReason}, PAID_TM = CASE WHEN #{paymentStatus} = 'P' THEN NOW() ELSE PAID_TM END, UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}

/* Payment.updatePaymentDetStatus */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT_DET SET PAYMENT_STATUS = #{paymentStatus}, PG_TID = #{pgTid}, PORTONE_PAYMENT_ID = #{portonePaymentId}, FAIL_REASON = #{failReason}, RAW_RESPONSE = #{rawResponse}::jsonb, APPROVED_TM = CASE WHEN #{paymentStatus} = 'P' THEN NOW() ELSE APPROVED_TM END, UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
/* Payment.updatePaymentCancel */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT SET PAYMENT_STATUS = 'C', CANCEL_AMOUNT = COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, CANCEL_AMOUNT), CANCELLED_TM = NOW(), UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
/* Payment.updatePaymentDetCancel */ UPDATE TB_PAYMENT_DET SET PAYMENT_STATUS = 'C', CANCEL_AMOUNT = COALESCE(#{cancelAmount}, CANCEL_AMOUNT), CANCELLED_TM = NOW(), UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
